name: mallard
description: Get your Copilot spend all in a row. A live dashboard of cost, model usage, and where every credit goes — read from Copilot's local logs. No sign-in, no telemetry.

mallard.currency.description: Display currency for all cost amounts in the dashboard and status bar (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, CAD). Exchange rates are fetched daily from Frankfurter. MQTT and webhook metric exports always use USD regardless of this setting.

mallard.copilotLogPath.description: Override path to the Copilot log directory (blank = auto-detect via VS Code logUri).

mallard.pricingManifestUrl.description: Override URL for the pricing manifest JSON. Leave blank to use the auto-refreshed default.

enumDescriptions: Fixed Swiss duotone: one red accent plus a grayscale ramp.
Derive the accent from your VS Code theme (validated for contrast and colour-blindness).
mallard.palette.description: Dashboard chart palette. Both modes keep the duotone structure and are checked for accessibility.

mallard.refreshIntervalMinutes.description: How often Mallard re-reads logs and recomputes the snapshot (minutes). Lower values increase responsiveness at the cost of CPU.

mallard.dataRetentionDays.description: How many days of raw per-request events to keep before rolling up into daily totals. Higher values use more disk.

mallard.server.url.description: Base URL of your self-hosted Mallard server (e.g. https://mallard.example.com). Used as the webhook endpoint and as the fallback MQTT WebSocket host.

enumDescriptions: POST usage metrics as JSON to the server's HTTP webhook endpoint.
Publish usage metrics over MQTT/WebSocket to the server.
mallard.export.transport.description: Transport to use for metric export. Set mallard.server.url first. Leave blank to disable.

enumDescriptions: Send an X-API-Key header. Set mallard.webhook.apiKey.
Send an Authorization: Bearer header. Set mallard.webhook.bearerToken.
Authenticate with a client TLS certificate. Set mallard.shared.certificate.*.

mallard.webhook.apiKey.description: API key sent as X-API-Key on every webhook POST. Active when mallard.webhook.auth = apiKey.

mallard.webhook.bearerToken.description: Token sent as Authorization: Bearer on every webhook POST. Active when mallard.webhook.auth = bearer.

mallard.mqtt.url.description: MQTT broker WebSocket URL (e.g. wss://mallard.example.com/mqtt). Overrides mallard.server.url for MQTT. Only wss:// accepted.

enumDescriptions: Authenticate with username and password. Set mallard.mqtt.username and run Mallard: Set MQTT Export Password.
Authenticate with a client TLS certificate. Set mallard.shared.certificate.*.

mallard.mqtt.username.description: MQTT username. Active when mallard.mqtt.auth = password.

mallard.shared.certificate.file.description: Path to PEM client certificate file. Used by any transport where auth = certificate.

mallard.shared.certificate.keyFile.description: Path to PEM private key file paired with mallard.shared.certificate.file.

mallard.shared.certificate.caFile.description: Path to CA bundle PEM file to verify the server's TLS certificate.

scripts.pretest: bun run compile-tests && bun run compile && bun run check-types && bun run lint
